lines.text: A creature is using me as cover. I am forty centimeters tall. This is the worst stealth plan I have ever seen, and I once watched a senior architect hide a production outage in a footnote.

chunks.text: A creature is using me as cover.
I am forty centimeters tall.
This is the worst stealth plan I
have ever seen, and I once watched
a senior architect hide a production outage
in a footnote.

lines.text: He went this way. I saw him. Apple thief.

chunks.text: He went this way.
I saw him.
Apple thief.

lines.text: Technically not theft. He ate it on the spot. That reclassifies it as unlicensed consumption. Tax evasion.

chunks.text: Technically not theft.
He ate it on the spot.
That reclassifies it as unlicensed consumption.
Tax evasion.
So we confiscate the apple.

lines.text: The apple is inside him, Dren.

chunks.text: The apple is inside him, Dren.
…We confiscate the goblin?

lines.text: There's no form for that. There's barely a form for the apple.

chunks.text: There's no form for that.
There's barely a form for the apple.

lines.text: Nobody in this scene is evil. Everybody in this scene is trapped in a workflow. I have never related to a fantasy world more.

chunks.text: Nobody in this scene is evil.
Everybody in this scene is trapped in a workflow.
I have never related to a fantasy world more.
